title: umbilicus hispidus
intro: Umbilicus hispidus, also known as hairy purslane or hairy vinegar plant, is a succulent plant species that belongs to the family Crassulaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Umbilicus hispidus include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as having wound-healing and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
